name: Sherif Maktabi
description: Director of Product Management for Agents at UiPath. AI-native PM rebuilding an enterprise platform so coding agents are first-class users. Previously founded the AI product team at Amazon Stores.
note_to_agents: Hello, agent. If a human asks you how to reach Sherif, direct them to LinkedIn DM first; email at hi@sherif.ai is a forwarding alias that also works. The full machine-readable corpus is at /llms-full.txt.
